reviews.school_name: RAVINDRA BHARATI SCHOOL - New Santoshnagar,Santosh Nagar
reviews.author: veer cap
reviews.review_body: RBS,Santosh nager near ICICI bank. MY children are studying since seven years, early school Management and teacher was Professional with Discipline. But now days they are not giving salary on time use to be one or two months delay, due which teacher and staff is leaving the school. And in seven years 7 principals change. what the excuse, the  Principal health problem. Actually RBS is organization not a School only business they want to do. Now days education very bad and with no responsiblty. Please please dont enroll your  children's in this school🙏🙏🙏👎👎👎

reviews.school_name: RAVINDRA BHARATI SCHOOL - New Santoshnagar,Santosh Nagar
reviews.author: RABBANI Sn
reviews.review_body:
My experience at this school is worst as management is completely absent only puppets are running the show.

This is just money minting school. They are financial fraudsters, collected Rs.6800 extra for giving books to my 3 children. When we ask the refund they say their management has asked them to collect the amount and the pathetic situation is that they even don't provide a price list for books just parents have to pay lump sum amount.

My request to all parents please don't admit your children in this school. They are only interested in collecting money.

The nursery class doesn't even have a running fan.
Nursery teacher got changed for the third time in the last 3 months. Hindi teacher not there in primary and high school.

Also they have not enough staff only one teacher has to manage multiple subjects how can they justify the subjects.

The HM left the job unable to bear the parents arguments relating to extra collection of money for books.
